g.text: Total File Size = 64 + (C * P * 4) + IDMap_Len + Slots_Len + Meta_Len + 16 (prefixes)
0x40 | f32 Contiguous Array: [ capacity × padded_dim ] | size: (C * P * 4) Bytes

div.p: IMPLEMENTATION DETAIL: Each vector start index i is located at: offset = 0x40 + (i * padded_dim * 4) Ensure padded_dim * 4 is a multiple of FileHeader.alignment.

g.text: OFFSET + 8 | HashMap<u64, (slot_idx: usize, gen: u32)> | size: Variable
OFFSET | [ (is_present: u8, external_id: u64, generation: u32) ] × capacity | size: Variable
